title: Parent — Self-Study Progress
content:
Overview


The Self-Study Progress page tracks each child's independent learning activity on the platform. It shows course completion, overall performance, and recent quiz attempts.



Selecting a Child


Child sub-tabs appear at the top — one for each linked child. Click a child's tab to view their progress. Each child's data is completely separate.



Course Progress


The left card shows progress bars for each self-study course the child is enrolled in. Each bar displays:


  • Course name
  • Completion percentage with a visual progress bar

Progress is calculated based on quizzes completed, chapters read, and other activities within each course.



Overall Performance


The right card shows summary statistics:


  • Average Grade: Overall percentage across all completed quizzes
  • Quizzes Completed: Total number of quizzes taken
  • Study Hours: Estimated time spent studying
  • Enrolled Courses: Number of self-study courses the child is enrolled in


Recent Quiz Attempts


A scrollable list at the bottom shows the child's most recent quiz activity. Each entry displays:


  • Subject: Which course the quiz belongs to
  • Quiz name: The specific quiz taken
  • Score: The result achieved
  • Date: When the quiz was taken

This helps parents understand how their child is using the platform independently, beyond assigned schoolwork.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Use the sub-tabs to switch between your children — each child's progress is tracked separately."
  • "Course progress bars show how much of each course your child has completed."
  • "Recent quiz attempts show exactly which quizzes your child took and how they scored."
  • "This page tracks self-study activity — it's separate from school grades."
  • "Progress updates automatically as your child completes quizzes and studies."
